name: W3 KB Conditioning Morning Flow
description: 15 min hip-heavy flow before KB Refine day. Different from the D2 flow — this one is more recovery-oriented since you've had 3 training days already. Plow pose for spinal decompression, deep stretches for sore hips, light core.

exercises.notes: Slow transitions. Inhale arch, exhale round. Gets into the thoracic spine and shoulders.

NEW — lie on back, legs over head, toes touch floor behind you. Full posterior chain stretch + spinal decompression. If you can't reach the floor, just go as far as comfortable. Skip if neck feels weird.
Grab feet, knees toward armpits. Rock gently side to side. Resets the lower back and opens hips.
30s each side. Keep hips square, fold over front leg. Different angle than Tuesday's hip work.
Hands and knees, wide knees, sink back. Intense inner thigh opener. Breathe through the discomfort.
Kneel, lean back. Quad and hip flexor stretch. If you did this Tuesday, you should be able to go deeper today.
Opposite arm/leg. Keep lower back glued to floor. Familiar and effective.
20s each side. Obliques + shoulder stability. Primes the lateral stability you need for KB work.

tips: 15 min — recovery-focused. You've had push, KB, and pull this week already.
Plow pose: if it feels weird on your neck, skip it. Do a forward fold instead.
Frog stretch: second time this week if you did the pull day flow. Should feel easier.
If you're time-crunched like last week: do the decompress + deep hips blocks, skip core.
This flow + the KB Refine workout should take ~45 min total
